---
title: "Writing & Syndication"
subtitle: "Day 2 - Block 6"
format:
  revealjs:
    footer: "TI Workshop | D2 B6"
    scrollable: true
    bibliography:
      - ../../../resources/workshop-citations.bib
      - ../../assets/references.bib
    embed-resources: true
---

## Thinking first {background-image="../../assets/images/notebook.jpg"}



## Bring thinking online

```{mermaid}
flowchart LR
  H[Handwritten or tablet notes] --> O[OCR or export]
  O --> M[Markdown or plain text]
  M --> A[AI-assisted structuring]
```

## Bullets ➡️ Draft ➡️ Edit

```text
1. Write bullet outline
2. Let AI draft paragraph
3. Edit it yourself
```

## Voice is powerful


Speech-to-text has gotten really good

- runs locally & fast (different languages, conversations, ...)
- can post-process transcripts with LLM (e.g. email formatting)
- 2x faster than typing

. . . 

(and yes, you can also speak with the AI)

## {background-iframe="https://handy.computer/" interactive=true}


## Speak your draft

```text
Voice: "Main point: firms adopt AI unevenly. We should connect productivity gains to substitution risk and say evidence is still mixed."

AI draft: "AI adoption appears uneven across firms, with productivity gains coexisting alongside substitution risks, while current evidence remains mixed."
```

## {background-image="../../assets/images/recordings.png" background-size="contain"}


## {background-image="../../assets/images/feedback.png" background-size="contain"}


## Journal policies

<!-- TODO: update this with top marketing, finance, econ, ectr journal -->

- Disclosure rules differ
- Check journal guidance first
- Keep human accountability explicit


## Syndication of research

```{mermaid}
%%| fig-align: center
flowchart TD
  P[Paper] --> W[Website]
  P --> S[Slides]
  P --> L[LinkedIn]
  P --> O[Podcast]
  P --> K[...]
```

## {background-video="../../assets/videos/companion.mp4" background-size="contain"}


## {background-video="../../assets/videos/companion2.mp4" background-size="contain"}


{{< include ../_exercise_slide.qmd >}}

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
